channel.title: Tech on Apoorva Sharma
channel.description: Recent content in Tech on Apoorva Sharma

item.title: traininglogs
item.description: A Python pipeline that parses free-text training session logs into a structured NoSQL/JSON schema. Includes dataclass models, a CLI, and an agent layer for AI-assisted log intake.

item.title: This Website
item.description: Minimal personal site built with Hugo. No themes, no JS framework. Custom layouts per section. Deployed to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions.
